nodes.name: iiab
nodes.en: The iiab content stack: what a person on the tenant actually browses — knowledge, media and collaboration services behind the tenant domain.

nodes.name: nextcloud
nodes.en: Nextcloud, the tenant file cloud: WebDAV storage plus OCS sharing APIs. The canonical place for user documents on the estate.

nodes.name: nextcloud-credential
nodes.en: The Nextcloud app password issued to agent accounts. An issued secret, nothing more: WebDAV and OCS calls authenticate with it, and it can be rotated without changing what any skill does.
